channel.title: Upgrade Existing OOB :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: Why would do this? Rebuild OOB completely without losing Homepage, Guacamole, and Ansible configs Want OOB built off a newer Ubuntu Template VM Want latest Ansible Scripts Backup Configs Guacamole ​ from Terminal in /home/Fortinet/c_data/guacamole cd /home/fortinet/c_data/guacamole docker compose ps docker compose exec guacamole-sql /bin/sh sh-5.1# mysqldump -u root -p --all-databases --set-gtid-purged=OFF > backup.sql Enter password: password sh-5.1# exit docker compose cp guacamole-sql:/backup.sql ./backup.sql Optional: SCP backup.sql to your laptop ( always good to have a copy not on the VM ) Ansible, Homepage, CoreDNS ​ from Terminal in /home/Fortinet cd /home/fortinet The following is a single command all on one line zip backup_config.zip automation/ansible/inventory/inventory.yml automation/ansible/vars/all-hosts.yml automation/ansible/vars/flex-serial-numbers.yml automation/ansible/vars/global.yml c_data/coredns/conf/zones/db.fortinet.internal c_data/coredns/conf/zones/db.home.internal c_data/homepage/config/bookmarks.yaml c_data/homepage/config/services.yaml c_data/homepage/config/settings.yaml c_data/homepage/config/widgets.yaml .ssh/ansible_key .ssh/ansible_key.pub Optional: SCP backup_config.zip to your laptop ( always good to have a copy off the VM ) Start Upgrade ​ from Terminal in OOB Pull the latest OOB install scripts from github repository cd /home/fortinet/Downloads/ git clone https://github.com/fortinet/Field-SE-Lab-OOB /home/fortinet/Downloads chmod 744 *.sh ​ from Terminal in OOB Run the following script ONLY IF changing the external default subnet from 172.16.3.x (provide ONLY the first 3 octets) Example: ./update_subnet.sh 192.168.10 ./update_subnet.sh <external subnet to SE Lab> ​ from Terminal in OOB Next start the install script ./OOB_Install.sh When you see the following message File ‘/usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg’ exists. Overwrite? (y/N) Type y and hit < enter > Note: VM will auto reboot after “OOB_Install.sh” script runs
